title: The Quarrymen at St Peter's Church fete
desc: John Lennon's skiffle group perform at the church fete where he first met Paul McCartney.

title: The Quarrymen at New Clubmoor Hall
desc: Early Quarrymen performance. Paul McCartney's first appearance with the group on stage.

title: The Quarrymen at Harry Harrison's wedding
desc: The Quarrymen play at George Harrison's brother Harry's wedding reception.

title: The Quarrymen at the Casbah Coffee Club
location: Casbah Coffee Club, West Derby, Liverpool
desc: The opening night of the Casbah Coffee Club, run by Mona Best in her basement. The Quarrymen are the resident band.

title: Audition for Larry Parnes at the Wyvern Club
location: Wyvern Social Club, Seel Street, Liverpool
desc: The Silver Beetles audition for promoter Larry Parnes, hoping to back Billy Fury on tour. Stuart Sutcliffe and Tommy Moore also present.

title: First night at the Indra Club, Hamburg
desc: The Beatles begin their first Hamburg residency at the Indra Club on Grosse Freiheit. Bruno Koschmider books them for 48 nights.

title: At the Kaiserkeller, Hamburg
desc: The Beatles move from the Indra to the larger Kaiserkeller after noise complaints shut the Indra down. Rory Storm and the Hurricanes — featuring Ringo Starr — are also on the bill.

title: Astrid Kirchherr photo session, Hamburg fairground
desc: Astrid Kirchherr, girlfriend of Stuart Sutcliffe, photographs the band at a Hamburg fairground. Among the first serious artistic portraits of the group.

title: The Beatles at the Top Ten Club, Hamburg
desc: Second Hamburg trip. The band play the Top Ten Club for three months, now a tighter, more experienced live act.

title: Recording with Tony Sheridan at Friedrich-Ebert-Halle
desc: The Beatles back Tony Sheridan on recordings for Polydor, their first commercial studio session. 'My Bonnie' is recorded here.

title: The Beatles at the Cavern Club
desc: One of hundreds of Cavern Club performances in 1961. Brian Epstein attends for the first time in November of this year after hearing about the band.

title: First professional photo session with Albert Marrion
desc: Brian Epstein commissions local wedding photographer Albert Marrion for the band's first professional photo session. They wear leather jackets.

title: Decca audition, London
desc: The Beatles audition for Decca Records in London, recording 15 songs. Decca famously pass, saying 'guitar groups are on the way out.'

title: At the Star-Club, Hamburg
desc: The Beatles begin their final Hamburg residency at the newly opened Star-Club. Stuart Sutcliffe dies on this day in Hamburg of a brain haemorrhage.

title: First EMI recording session, Abbey Road
location: Abbey Road Studios, St John's Wood, London
desc: The Beatles record at EMI Studios for the first time, with producer Ron Richards sitting in for George Martin. Pete Best is still the drummer.
